gale.hero_title: Landing pages that ship with a blog
gale.hero_subtitle: A Dune-native theme inspired by AstroWind — sticky header, hero CTAs, feature grid, and a card blog. Not a port.
gale.feature_1_text: Static-first pages with a light CSS footprint — no framework bundle required for the public site.
gale.feature_2_text: Hero copy, CTAs, and feature columns live in theme config so demos and real sites stay in sync.
gale.feature_3_text: The same theme that sells the product also lists posts — card grid on home and /blog/.
gale.home_subtitle: Recent posts from the demo blog.
